string.text: Anomalous field decoder. Can be used to close a spatial bubble.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Developed by scientists.
Decoder
Old schematics describing the components required to assemble the secret weapon "GAUSS". An experienced technician could probably figure this out.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Military development.
Assembly Scheme «№62»

Addressed to mercenary Jackal:\nJackal... Your people are completely incompetent at their work, got it? My people will soon arrive at the village - and no electronic transmitters! Communicate via carrier pigeons, understood?! I pay you not for eavesdropping! Damn it, you fought, you know what info leaks mean!? Anyway, put more people guarding the basement. I’m leaving a spare keycard here, the note too, forget it, it’ll get lost… My people will approach you through the factory from nearby. Until then, make sure the keycard is securely protected, understood!? Oh, and… "Pendeho" is still alive. Means your bruisers aren’t professionals… He’ll come for me. It’s just a matter of time. So, just delay him as much as possible and try not to die!\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Prophet's personal item.
Prophet's Notebook
The key has a tag with the letter "P".\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Jackal's personal item.
Key «P»
Security system keycard. Can be used to forcibly disable the complex's self-destruction protocol.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Developed by scientists.
Keycard «SB»
Access card for the underground "Collider" complex.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Military development.
Keycard «COLLIDER»
A type of key used to open his personal safe...\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Jackal's development.
Special Key «Jackal»

Mercenary leader’s PDA. Contains one recent sent message from the user:
"Fabricat, take four fighters with you and grab a sniper from the warehouse. I warned you - 'Mech' will give the go-ahead. Stalkers started hanging around the church, and one of them clearly saw us last night in the village. They mustn’t get into our business with the Prophet, but they’ll try to see what we’re hiding. By any means necessary - don’t let them reach the basement, understood? Go there fast."
Some code is also in the files:
%c[255,248,153,26]7253871
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Jackal»

Mercenary PDA, belonging to a group that ambushed us in the village. Everything is cleared, only one read message from "Jackal" remains:\n"1. Fabricat, take four fighters with you and grab a sniper from the warehouse. I warned you - 'Mech' will give the go-ahead. Stalkers started hanging around the church, and one of them clearly saw us last night in the village. They mustn’t get into our business with the Prophet, but they’ll try to see what we’re hiding. By any means necessary - don’t let them reach the basement, understood? Go there fast."\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Fabricat»

Memory module found under an unmanned reconnaissance drone. Lyosha "Digger" dried and unlocked the module, revealing the data collected by the scout: among other things, it contains 4 bearings for radio beacons.
Memory Module (Unlocked)
Memory module found under an unmanned reconnaissance drone. Despite the carrier crashing into the river, the module works – but unfortunately, it is locked.
Memory Module (Locked)
This device should scan psi-radiation in the waterpark. How to use it – no idea, but fortunately, Gloria will handle it.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Developed by scientists.
Scanning Device

A collection of evidence about sectarians’ activities in the Zone.
Includes data about camps and bases of these fanatics.
Photo reports, recorded conversations, and other materials regarding human trafficking and organ trade on the black market.
Also contains information about their plans, routes, and connections outside the Zone.
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Highly classified documentation.
Compromising Material on Sectarians

Install that contraption we stole from the Radar lab on the church roof. Seems like it really messes with the brain, hehe... Some might drop immediately, but... With it, we will recruit new followers!\nP.S. Your beloved father, Prophet.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Prophet's personal item.
Prophet's Note

Latest audio messages:
1. Very interesting landscape... Many anomalous jumps recorded from the church. They seem to have a psi-emission effect, but why?! Continuing to explore, but we won’t enter yet; need to check surroundings first and see what our device shows.
2. Oddities abound nearby... One of the assistants starts seeing strange things; I think it’s time to pack up and return to Professor Bernade. Further experiments are too dangerous. But… the second assistant seems altered, never was aggressive - I knew this person well. Most likely psi-emission! Must leave immediately, pack the devices and return. Assistant, what are you doing, stop!
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Pheromone»
Detector scanner designed to locate various anomalous psi-waves.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Property of scientists.
Anti-Psi-Emitter Device
Secret schematics for installing and activating an artificially created anomalous shard P-24 - "NOO-spherical shard".\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Property of the Research Institute.
Secret Documents

Latest audio message:
Message:
The devil made me leave the "Freedom complex"... Heard in the bar about the canyon, ha! And the rumors about this place are something. No anomalies, no artifacts... Silence. I thought they just fenced off the "tasty" location. But it turns out... they wanted to fence off from the creature that lives here. The forest is indeed quiet...
But those tentacles, piercing gaze and... The size of that bloodsucker really scared me! They call such mutants "Strongheads", right? The oldest and most dangerous of their kind. And their size is rare, can be counted on fingers. Ha-ha...
*coughing turns into vomiting*.
%c[default]That howl is unbearable, I need a bandage and splint, tie my leg, and somehow limp to the stalkers, to safety... But seems not meant to be... I hear its steps... Getting closer...
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Baron»

In 1999, moved from Spain to Belarus (17 years old).
In 2004, moved to Russia (22 years old).
In 2006, noosphere explosion occurred in the Zone.
2007 (25 years old) - 2009 (27 years old) fought in the Chechen war.
2009-2016 lived in a Khrushchyovka in Bryansk. Practically idle, used drugs, served two years for robbery, drank heavily and barely made ends meet.
Early 2017 received a contract in the Zone.
2018 took Soldier and Macho as partners, went into the Zone.
2018-2020 attempted to create his own group, without success.
2021-2023, thanks to connections with trader Garrota and Lieutenant Potapenko, founded his own sect, starting first kidnappings, stalker tortures, etc.
2023-2024 Sect gains notoriety in the Zone; ordinary stalkers avoid them, sect consolidates power, and Prophet loses his sanity.
Currently approximately 42 years old.
Biographical Document
Flash drive found in a safe near the stalkers' camp. May contain something useful.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Flash Drive from Safe

Box is locked with a sophisticated mechanism. Judging by its weight and rattling, something is inside. Could be sold, but maybe it contains something interesting...\nA skilled technician is needed to unlock it.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Technician-use item.
Locked "Freedom" Container
With this keycard I can access a secret metro station under the sanatorium.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important item to open path to the sanatorium station.
Keycard «M-6»

Freedom fighter PDA. Last message from Garrota:
Message:
Grey, don’t fail. This soldier, Voland, must die quietly without witnesses. I left a note on my desk with the coordinates of the meeting place. He’ll come there at night, I’ll mark the location in your PDA. Kill him and take the envelope. Bring it to me; payment will be arranged on site.
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Grey»
Envelope given to me by Tesak in exchange for the case.\nContents must remain intact and delivered to the trader.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important item for trader Garrota.
Envelope for «Garrota»
Flash drive found in the hand of an old decayed corpse in the chamber bed at the "Lucky Ones" bar. May contain something useful.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Corpse Flash Drive

Mercenary PDA. Contains coordinates of a stash and a message from someone named Markus.
Message:
Today we’ll make a big deal with the bandits, I marked the meeting place. Hurry to the point, I’m waiting for you there!
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Reker»
Flash drive of a sectarian giving a speech at the sanatorium. May contain something useful.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Flash Drive "Monk"
High-tech container, protected from tampering, fire, and drops. Contents likely very important to deliver intact.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Item for the deal between Garrota and Tesak.
Case «Garrota»

The sheet marks a secret underground path leading to the metro under the sanatorium. Mentions a key to open the "Gates". Also contains a note...
Note:
Do not harm the errant servant, feed and water him. I will be at our hideout soon, meanwhile - pray, they will come for him soon.
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Sectarian Note with Map

Contains a fresh recording.
Message:
Oh my god! I fly straight from America, but ended up in the Bermuda triangle! What is it, where am I? Don’t understand!? Ahhh!
Recording ends abruptly.
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA «Sam»
Box of wrenches, spanners, combination tools. Good set for vehicle repairs.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Item for a skilled mechanic.
Tool Set
Black box found on a plane. Technician needed to unlock and access its data.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Item for technician unlocking.
Flight Recorder
Seems this key can open something on the plane.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Item for unlocking a box.
Plane Key
Apparently this access card can open doors in the underground complex «V-3».\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Item for opening doors.
Keycard «V-3»
Seems like they wear this as a badge of distinction.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Sectarian Medallion

This PDA belongs to my brother.
Message:
We are surrounded... I can’t comprehend how so many of them appeared! They overwhelm us by numbers, they are insane! Charging straight at us, fists, knives, and bullets... Feels like they fear nothing, damn! They are maniacs, no doubt... Retreating to the school, no choice, too many of them.
%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
PDA Nikita
The nature and properties of this thing are unknown; to learn what kind of artifact it is, one should consult the scientists.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Unknown anomalous item.
Cluster of Chemicals
This set is needed by the technician in the camp. With it, he can open the case I brought him.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Technician's item.
Technician's Tools
There’s something inside, but the box has a very sophisticated lock.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Locked Case
This flash drive may contain useful information, just need a computer to check its contents.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Sectarian Flash Drive
The owner locked it, maybe it contained something important.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Carrier's personal item.
Locked PDA
Military report, apparently for a superior officer. Nothing useful for me in these papers.\n%c[226,90,0,255]• %c[default]Important investigation item.
Report
